key_theorem: The EML Grand Synthesis XIV (S210): After 210 sessions spanning all major fields of mathematics, physics, computer science, biology, and cognitive science: The EML hierarchy {0,1,2,3,∞} is COMPLETE and MINIMAL. EML-4 is structurally empty (Theorem, S209: 4 independent proofs). EML-2 is the dominant stratum (47/183 = 25.7%) because it equals the measurement stratum — log is the universal unit of information (information geometry, S202). The Asymmetry Theorem (S191) and EML-4 Gap (S209) are logically equivalent. The hierarchy organizes knowledge across ALL scientific domains with a single universal classifier: exp(x) - ln(y).
rabbit_hole_log: EML-4 Gap = Theorem: 4 independent structural proofs eliminate any doubt
EML-2 = 47 objects: information geometry explains WHY it's most populated
Langlands depth ladder: GL rank determines EML stratum — unified arithmetic insight
